_comment: contractSets keyed by NETWORK ID (not a semantic role): PancakeSwap MasterChef V3 reward contract per chain, previously hardcoded in PancakeMasterChefEnricher (MASTER_CHEF_BY_NETWORK). Each network maps to exactly one MasterChef V3 address. Source: https://docs.pancakeswap.finance/developers/smart-contracts/pancakeswap-exchange/v3-contracts. Addresses are normalized lowercase (RPC eth_call `to` is case-insensitive).
